WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN "Provide these elements additional trainings to improve their ability to convince clients." SalesforcecalculationDays to CloseexactDATEDIFF("day", [__MyToday], [Calculation_822751375422500864])DATEDIFF(DATE(2022,04,18), 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date], DAY)
SalesforcecalculationDays to Close (bucket)exactIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<0 then "Overdue" ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<30 then "0-30 days" ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<90 then "1-3 months" ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<180 then "3-6 months" ELSE "> 6 months" ENDIF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 0, "Overdue", IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 30, "0-30 days", IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 90, "1-3 months", IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 180, "3-6 months", "> 6 months"))))
SalesforcecalculationProbability (bucket)exactIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.25 THEN "0-25%" ELSEIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.50 THEN "25-50%" ELSEIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.75 THEN "50-75%" ELSE "75-100%" ENDIF(SUM('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.25, "0-25%", IF(SUM('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.50, "25-50%", IF(SUM('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.75, "50-75%", "75-100%")))
SalesforcecalculationRank Sales Value (for selected Opp Owner)exact// Count the distinct number of Opportunity Owner // where Opportunity Owner's [Sales Value] > Selected Opportunity Owner [Sales Value] COUNTD(if {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_235739231649065059]} > {MAX((IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : ZN([LinPack_235739231649065059])} ELSE 0 END))} and Not [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] then [Calculation_711568759570620418] end)+1/* TODO: DAX conversion validation failed for Calculation_703968976541376514: unterminated double-quoted string literal */ BLANK()
SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Idexact[Opportunity ID]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Opportunity ID]))
SalesforcecalculationAccountexact[Account Name]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Account[Account Name]))
SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Ownerexact[First Name]+' '+[Last Name]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE('Created By'[FirstName (Created By)]))&" "&CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE('Created By'[LastName (Created By)]))
SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Descriptionexact[Name]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Name]))
SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Stageexact[Stage]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Stage]))
SalesforcecalculationOpen FlagexactIIF([Closed],"N","Y","Unknown")IF(CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Closed])), "N", "Y")
SalesforcecalculationWon FlagexactIIF([Closed] AND [Won],"Y","N","Unknown" )IF(CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Closed])) && CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Won])), "Y", "N")
SalesforcecalculationProbability %exact[Probability (%)]/100CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Probability (%)]))/100

SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Amountexact[Amount]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount]))

SalesforcecalculationOpen/Won/Lostexactif [Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y" then "Open" ELSEIF [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then "Won" ELSE "Lost" endIF('Owned By'[Open Flag]="Y", "Open", IF('Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y", "Won", "Lost"))
SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Close Dateexact[Close Date] //DATE(DATEADD('month',5,[Close Date]))CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Close Date]))
SalesforcecalculationDeal Size Bucketexactsplit([Deal Size Bucket (sort) (copy)_6178375792275554304], "|",2)PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Deal Size Bucket (key)], "|", "|"), 2)
SalesforcecalculationOpen/Won/Lost Iconexactcase [Calculation_747316110822866944] when "Open" then "" When "Won" then "✔" when "Lost" then "✘" endSWITCH('Owned By'[Open/Won/Lost], "Open", "", "Won", "✔", "Lost", "✘")
SalesforcecalculationTodayexact__MyTodayDATE(2022,04,18)
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Review - DONE - Keyexact//Achievements if [Calculation_746190227234947072] then "Last " + [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days|Closed Last "+ [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days" ELSEIF [Closed in Last 7 Days (copy)_746190227235745795] then "Last " + [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days|New Opportunities last "+ [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days" else "Other" endIF('Owned By'[Is Closed in Last x Days?], "Last " & "90" & " days|Closed Last "& "90" & " days", IF('Owned By'[Is Created in Last x Days?], "Last " & "90" & " days|New Opportunities last "& "90" & " days", "Other"))
SalesforcecalculationConversion Rate Average (for trends)exactRUNNING_SUM([LinPack_235739231649065059])/RUNNING_SUM([LinPack_707557147340278467])/* TODO: DAX conversion validation failed for Calculation_928867483214106624: unconverted Tableau function token detected in DAX output */ BLANK()
SalesforcecalculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Nb of OppexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Overdue")) = "Closing Overdue")))
Salesforcecalculation_Per Customer: Pipeline GenerationexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients (copy)_1243275034711019521]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation (Last N Months - Created Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation (Last N Months - Created Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
SalesforcecalculationTotal Sales for Existing ClientsexactSUM(IF [Calculation_614178463385964547]="Existing Clients" AND [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_961643984189344200] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Opportunity]="Existing Clients" && 'Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?], 'Owned By'[_Total Sales (Expression)], BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline GenerationexactIF [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5 then "1" ELSEIF [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*2 then "2" ELSEIF [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*3 then "3" ELSEIF [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*4 then "4" ELSE "5" ENDIF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))
SalesforcecalculationIs Created in Last x Days?exact[Days to Close (copy)_928304533158825988]>=0 and [Days to Close (copy)_928304533158825988]<=int([Parameters].[pLastxDays]) and [Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y"'Owned By'[Days from Open] >= 0 && 'Owned By'[Days from Open] <= INT("90") && 'Owned By'[Open Flag]="Y"
SalesforcecalculationIs Last N months filter - Closed Date?exact[Calculation_822751375422500864]>DATEADD('month',-[Parameters].[Last x Days (copy)_1142225515621146627],__MyToday) AND [Calculation_822751375422500864] <= __MyToday'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date] > EDATE(DATE(2022,04,18), -36) && 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date] <= DATE(2022,04,18)
SalesforcecalculationIs Closing Overdue?exact[Calculation_680325065948213248]<0 and [Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y"'Owned By'[Days to Close] < 0 && 'Owned By'[Open Flag]="Y"
SalesforcecalculationIs Closing in Next x Days?exact[Calculation_680325065948213248]<=int([Parameters].[pNextxDays]) and [Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y"'Owned By'[Days to Close] <= INT("90") && 'Owned By'[Open Flag]="Y"
SalesforcecalculationDays to Close (bucket) (sort)exactIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<0 then 0 ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<30 then 10 ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<90 then 20 ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<180 then 30 ELSE 100 ENDIF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 0, 0, IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 30, 10, IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 90, 20, IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 180, 30, 100))))
SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Type (filter)exact[Opportunity Type]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Opportunity Type]))
SalesforcecalculationDays from OpenexactDATEDIFF("day", [Created Date], [__MyToday])[M-based column]
SalesforcecalculationDeal Size Bucket (sort)exactint(split([Deal Size Bucket (sort) (copy)_6178375792275554304], "|",1))INT(PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Deal Size Bucket (key)], "|", "|"), 1))
SalesforcecalculationDeal Size Bucket (key)exactIF [LinPack_523892480737294295]< 50000 then "20|< 50k" ELSEIF [LinPack_523892480737294295]< 100000 then "30|50k - 100k" ELSEIF [LinPack_523892480737294295]< 200000 then "40|100k - 200k" ELSEIF [LinPack_523892480737294295]< 500000 then "50|200k - 500k" ELSEIF [LinPack_523892480737294295]<1000000 then "60|500k - 1M" ELSE "99|>1M" endIF('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)] < 50000, "20|< 50k", IF('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)] < 100000, "30|50k - 100k", IF('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)] < 200000, "40|100k - 200k", IF('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)] < 500000, "50|200k - 500k", IF('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)] < 1000000, "60|500k - 1M", "99|>1M")))))
SalesforcecalculationIs Won Opportunity?exact[Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y"'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y"
SalesforcecalculationIs Selected Opportunity Owner Flag?exact[Parameters].[Opportunity Owner Parameter]=[Calculation_711568759570620418]"Bellina Catmull"='Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - Closed WON - Nb of OppexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y"))
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - Closed LOST - Nb of AccountsexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]<>"Y" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag] <> "Y"))
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - Closed LOST - Opp Amountexactsum(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]<>"Y" then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)SUMX('Owned By', IF((LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag] <> "Y", 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - New - Nb of OppexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("New")) = "New")))
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Clients (New)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" and [Calculation_614178463385661442] then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y" && 'Owned By'[Is First Time Client?]))
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - Closed WON - Nb of ClientsexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y"))
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - Closed LOST - Nb of OppexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]<>"Y" then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag] <> "Y"))
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - Closed WON - Opp AmountexactSUM(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)SUMX('Owned By', IF((LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y", 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - New - Nb of Accounts (Prospect)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Prospects" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("New")) = "New") && 'Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Account]="Prospects"))
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - New - Nb of AccountsexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("New")) = "New")))
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - New - Opp AmountexactSUM(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)SUMX('Owned By', IF((LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("New")) = "New"), 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationLabel DONE - New - Nb of Accounts (Client)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Existing Clients" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("New")) = "New") && 'Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Account]="Existing Clients"))
SalesforcecalculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Next x days - Nb of Accounts (Prospect)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Prospects" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Next")) = "Closing Next") && 'Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Account]="Prospects"))
SalesforcecalculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Next x days - Nb of Accounts (Client)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Existing Clients" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Next")) = "Closing Next") && 'Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Account]="Existing Clients"))
SalesforcecalculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Next x days - Nb of AccountsexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Next")) = "Closing Next")))
SalesforcecalculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Nb of Accounts (Client)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Existing Clients" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Overdue")) = "Closing Overdue") && 'Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Account]="Existing Clients"))

SalesforcecalculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Next x days - Nb of OppexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Next")) = "Closing Next")))

SalesforcecalculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Opp AmountexactSUM(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)SUMX('Owned By', IF((LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Overdue")) = "Closing Overdue"), 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))

SalesforcecalculationPipeline GeneratedexactSUM([LinPack_523892480737294295])SUM('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)])
SalesforcecalculationNb of OwnersexactCOUNTD([Calculation_711568759570620418])DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])
SalesforcecalculationWon/Lost RateexactZN([LinPack_345685562057570044]) / ZN([LinPack_945051434441023635])IF(ISBLANK([Nb of Won Opportunities]), 0, [Nb of Won Opportunities]) / IF(ISBLANK([Nb of Closed Opportunities]), 0, [Nb of Closed Opportunities])
SalesforcecalculationDimensionexactCASE [Parameters].[LinPack_093258324044640973] WHEN "Account" THEN [Calculation_711568759570489345] WHEN "Open Flag" THEN [Calculation_711568759572205574] WHEN "Opportunity Owner" THEN [Calculation_711568759570620418] WHEN "Opportunity Stage" THEN [Calculation_711568759572115461] WHEN "Opportunity Type" THEN [Opportunity Type] WHEN "Won Flag" THEN [Calculation_711568759572299783] ENDSWITCH("Account", "Account", 'Owned By'[Account], "Open Flag", 'Owned By'[Open Flag], "Opportunity Owner", 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner], "Opportunity Stage", 'Owned By'[Opportunity Stage], "Opportunity Type", CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Opportunity Type])), "Won Flag", 'Owned By'[Won Flag])
SalesforcecalculationTotal SalesexactSUM([LinPack_961643984189344200])SUM('Owned By'[_Total Sales (Expression)])
SalesforcecalculationNb of Open OpportunitiesexactCOUNTD(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?]))
SalesforcecalculationNb of Won OpportunitiesexactCOUNTD(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Is Won Opportunity?]))
SalesforcecalculationAvg Deal Size (won)exactAVG([LinPack_760893960995960019])AVERAGE('Owned By'[_Avg Deal Size (won) (Expression)])
SalesforcecalculationSales Velocityexact(ZN([LinPack_260602485593130101]) * ZN([LinPack_416672484957473515]) * ZN([LinPack_037187737916244637])) / ZN([LinPack_451823525181570600])(IF(ISBLANK([Nb of Open Opportunities]), 0, [Nb of Open Opportunities]) * IF(ISBLANK([Avg Deal Size (won)]), 0, [Avg Deal Size (won)]) * IF(ISBLANK('Owned By'[Won/Lost Rate]), 0, 'Owned By'[Won/Lost Rate])) / IF(ISBLANK([Sales Cycle]), 0, [Sales Cycle])
SalesforcecalculationSales CycleexactAVG(FLOAT(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN datediff("minute", [Created Date], [Calculation_822751375422500864]) / (24*60) END))AVERAGEX('Owned By', CONVERT(IF(NOT 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], DATEDIFF('Owned By'[CreatedDate (Owned By)], 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date], MINUTE) / (24*60), BLANK()), DOUBLE))
SalesforcecalculationAvg ProbabilityexactAVG([LinPack_574638457904073940])AVERAGE('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)])
SalesforcecalculationWeighted Pipeline ValueexactSUM(FLOAT(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759573139467]*[Amount] END))SUMX('Opportunities', CONVERT(IF(LOOKUPVALUE('Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], 'Owned By'[Id], Opportunities[OwnerId]), LOOKUPVALUE('Owned By'[Probability %], 'Owned By'[Id], Opportunities[OwnerId])*'Opportunities'[Amount], BLANK()), DOUBLE))
Salesforcecalculation_Pipeline Generated (Expression)exact[Amount]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount]))
Salesforcecalculation_Avg Probability (Expression)exact[Calculation_711568759573139467]'Owned By'[Probability %]
SalesforcecalculationNb of OpportunitiesexactCOUNTD([Calculation_711568759570227200])DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id])
SalesforcecalculationTotal Closed Opportunities AmountexactSUM([LinPack_808645294632541416])SUM('Owned By'[_Total Closed Opportunities Amount (Expression)])
SalesforcecalculationConversion RateexactZN([LinPack_235739231649065059]) / ZN([LinPack_707557147340278467])IF(ISBLANK([Total Sales]), 0, [Total Sales]) / IF(ISBLANK([Total Closed Opportunities Amount]), 0, [Total Closed Opportunities Amount])
Salesforcecalculation_Avg Deal Size (won) (Expression)exactFLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Amount] END)CONVERT(IF('Owned By'[Is Won Opportunity?], CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount])), BLANK()), DOUBLE)
SalesforcecalculationPipeline ValueexactSUM(FLOAT(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Amount] END))SUMX('Opportunities', CONVERT(IF(LOOKUPVALUE('Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], 'Owned By'[Id], Opportunities[OwnerId]), 'Opportunities'[Amount], BLANK()), DOUBLE))
Salesforcecalculation_Total Closed Opportunities Amount (Expression)exactFLOAT(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Amount] END)CONVERT(IF(NOT 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount])), BLANK()), DOUBLE)
SalesforcecalculationSales Cycle (won)exactAVG(FLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN datediff("minute", [Created Date], [Calculation_822751375422500864]) / (24*60) END))AVERAGEX('Owned By', CONVERT(IF('Owned By'[Is Won Opportunity?], DATEDIFF('Owned By'[CreatedDate (Owned By)], 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date], MINUTE) / (24*60), BLANK()), DOUBLE))
SalesforcecalculationNb of Closed OpportunitiesexactCOUNTD(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', NOT 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?]))
Salesforcecalculation_Total Sales (Expression)exactFLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Amount] END)CONVERT(IF('Owned By'[Is Won Opportunity?], CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount])), BLANK()), DOUBLE)
SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Owner Class - TitleexactIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN "CHAMPIONS" ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN "CLOSERS Growth Plan: Pipeline Generation" ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN "HUNTERS/FARMERS Growth Plan: Closing" ELSE "REQUIRED IMPROVEMENTS" ENDIF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_Champions], "CHAMPIONS", IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], "CLOSERS Growth Plan: Pipeline Generation", IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], "HUNTERS/FARMERS Growth Plan: Closing", "REQUIRED IMPROVEMENTS")))
SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Owner Class (sort)exactIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN 1 ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN 2 ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN 3 ELSE 4 ENDIF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_Champions], 1, IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], 2, IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], 3, 4)))
SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Owner ClassexactIF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] >3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] >3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] ELSEIF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] >3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] <=3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] ELSEIF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] <=3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] >3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] ELSE [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303] ENDIF([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)] > 3 && [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)] > 3, [pOpportunityOwner_Champions], IF([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)] > 3 && [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)] <= 3, [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], IF([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)] <= 3 && [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)] > 3, [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], [pOpportunityOwner_RequiredImprovements])))
SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Owner Class - ActionexactCASE [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683] WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN "Reward these elements, they can be a model for the other owners. Leverage their best-practices." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN "Guide them on how to generate pipeline." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN "Provide these elements additional trainings to improve their ability to convince clients." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303] THEN "These opportunity owners need to improve their skills in both areas, to get more business and to win over clients. Train them quickly." ENDSWITCH([Opportunity Owner Class], [pOpportunityOwner_Champions], "Reward these elements, they can be a model for the other owners. Leverage their best-practices.", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], "Guide them on how to generate pipeline.", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], "Provide these elements additional trainings to improve their ability to convince clients.", [pOpportunityOwner_RequiredImprovements], "These opportunity owners need to improve their skills in both areas, to get more business && to win over clients. Train them quickly.")
SalesforcecalculationOpportunity Owner Class - DescriptionexactCASE [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683] WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN "Top performers in the team. They perform well in all areas and pull the team up." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN "Effective at closing and winning deals, they can develop in Pipeline Generation (farming or hunting)." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN "Good at developing pipeline, they will improve their performance by developing their ability to close and win the deals." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303] THEN "Underperforming in pipeline generation and deal closing. " ENDSWITCH([Opportunity Owner Class], [pOpportunityOwner_Champions], "Top performers in the team. They perform well in all areas && pull the team up.", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], "Effective at closing && winning deals, they can develop in Pipeline Generation (farming || hunting).", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], "Good at developing pipeline, they will improve their performance by developing their ability to close && win the deals.", [pOpportunityOwner_RequiredImprovements], "Underperforming in pipeline generation && deal closing. ")
SalesforcecalculationConversion Rate (Last N Months - Closed Date)exact[Pipeline Generation (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034721849348]/[Total Sales (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034722263045][Total Sales (Last N Months - Closed Date)]/[Total Closed Opportunities Amount (Last N Months - Closed Date)]
SalesforcecalculationTotal Sales (Last N Months - Closed Date)exactSUM(IF [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_961643984189344200] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?], 'Owned By'[_Total Sales (Expression)], BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Generation (Last N Months - Created Date)exactSUM(IF [Last N months filter - Closed Date (copy)_1142225515621388292] then [LinPack_523892480737294295] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Created Date?], 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (Star)exactREPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042])," ","★") + REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042])," ","☆")SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)])," ","☆")
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Profile - Conversion RateexactIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5 then "1" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*2 then "2" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*3 then "3" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*4 then "4" ELSE "5" ENDIF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (description)exactCASE [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528067575816] WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW" WHEN "2" THEN "LOW" WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM" WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH" WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH" END + " Average Deal Size"SWITCH([Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size], "1", "VERY LOW", "2", "LOW", "3", "MEDIUM", "4", "HIGH", "5", "VERY HIGH") & " Average Deal Size"
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Axisexact100
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (num)exactint([Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528067575816])INT([Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size])
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (Star)exactREPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443])," ","★") + REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443])," ","☆")SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)])," ","☆")
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing ClientsexactIF [_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459])}/5 then "1" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459])}/5*2 then "2" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459])}/5*3 then "3" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459])}/5*4 then "4" ELSE "5" ENDIF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))

SalesforcecalculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales (description)exactCASE [Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (copy)_1849572132716658688] WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW" WHEN "2" THEN "LOW" WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM" WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH" WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH" END + " Ability to sell"SWITCH([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales], "1", "VERY LOW", "2", "LOW", "3", "MEDIUM", "4", "HIGH", "5", "VERY HIGH") & " Ability to sell"

SalesforcecalculationPipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1exactSPLIT([Calculation_928304533153746946], "|", 1)PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Key], "|", "|"), 1)
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2exactSPLIT([Calculation_928304533153746946], "|", 2)PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Key], "|", "|"), 2)
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 1exactSPLIT([Pipeline Review - DONE - Key (copy)_746190227239038986], "|", 1)PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Key], "|", "|"), 1)
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2exactSPLIT([Pipeline Review - DONE - Key (copy)_746190227239038986], "|", 2)PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Key], "|", "|"), 2)
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Review - FOCUS - KeyexactIF [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_746190227237216263] then "Overdue|Closing Overdue" ELSEIF [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_746190227237490696] then "Next " + [Parameters].[pNextxDays] + " days|Closing Next "+ [Parameters].[pNextxDays] + " days" else "Other" endIF('Owned By'[Is Closing Overdue?], "Overdue|Closing Overdue", IF('Owned By'[Is Closing in Next x Days?], "Next " & "90" & " days|Closing Next "& "90" & " days", "Other"))
SalesforcecalculationProbability (bucket) (sort)exactIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.25 THEN 10 ELSEIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.50 THEN 20 ELSEIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.75 THEN 30 ELSE 40 ENDIF(MAX('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.25, 10, IF(MAX('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.50, 20, IF(MAX('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.75, 30, 40)))
SalesforcecalculationSales Value (for selected Opp Owner)exactMAX(IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_235739231649065059]} END)MAXX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Selected Opportunity Owner Flag?], CALCULATE([Total Sales]), BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationRank Conversion Rate (for selected Opp Owner)exact// Count the distinct number of Opportunity Owner // where Opportunity Owner's [Conversion Rate] > Selected Opportunity Owner [Conversion Rate] COUNTD(if {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_713531991123124037]} > {MAX((IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : ZN([LinPack_713531991123124037])} ELSE 0 END))} and Not [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] then [Calculation_711568759570620418] end)+1/* TODO: DAX conversion validation failed for Rank Sales Value (for selected Opp Owner) (copy)_1048775823272144897: unterminated double-quoted string literal */ BLANK()
SalesforcecalculationRank Total Opp Amount (for selected Opp Owner)exact// Count the distinct number of Opportunity Owner // where Opportunity Owner's [Total Opp Amount] > Selected Opportunity Owner [Total Opp Amount] COUNTD(if {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_017255839264062096]} > {MAX((IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : ZN([LinPack_017255839264062096])} ELSE 0 END))} and Not [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] then [Calculation_711568759570620418] end)+1/* TODO: DAX conversion validation failed for Rank Sales Value (for selected Opp Owner) (copy)_928867483237888003: unterminated double-quoted string literal */ BLANK()
SalesforcecalculationConversion Rate (for selected Opp Owner)exactMAX(IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_713531991123124037]} END)MAXX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Selected Opportunity Owner Flag?], CALCULATE('Owned By'[Conversion Rate]), BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationTotal Opp Amount (for selected Opp Owner)exactMAX(IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_017255839264062096]} END)MAXX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Selected Opportunity Owner Flag?], CALCULATE([Pipeline Generated]), BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationTotal Closed Opportunities Amount (Last N Months - Closed Date)exactSUM(IF [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_808645294632541416] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?], 'Owned By'[_Total Closed Opportunities Amount (Expression)], BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationAverage Deal Size (Last N Months - Closed Date)exactSUM(IF [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_760893960995960019] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?], 'Owned By'[_Avg Deal Size (won) (Expression)], BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Generation for Existing ClientsexactSUM(IF [Calculation_614178463385964547]="Existing Clients" and [Last N months filter - Closed Date (copy)_1142225515621388292] THEN [LinPack_523892480737294295] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Opportunity]="Existing Clients" && 'Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Created Date?], 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationTotal Sales for ProspectsexactSUM(IF [Calculation_614178463385964547]="Prospects" AND [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_961643984189344200] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Opportunity]="Prospects" && 'Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?], 'Owned By'[_Total Sales (Expression)], BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationPipeline Generation for ProspectsexactSUM(IF [Calculation_614178463385964547]="Prospects" and [Last N months filter - Closed Date (copy)_1142225515621388292] then [LinPack_523892480737294295] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Opportunity]="Prospects" && 'Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Created Date?], 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
SalesforcecalculationURL Drill-back to Source Application on Opportunityexact// This Accelerator is configured to allow you yo drill back to your Source Application to see the detail of each "Opportunity Id" // The Drill Back is activated when clicking on a Project in the Accelerator // using a URL with the following format: // [URL Prefix] + [Opportunity Id] + [URL Suffix] // // For example when drilling back to an Opportunity on Salesforce Sales Cloud, // [URL Prefix] must be: "https://<YOUR_SALESFORCE_ORG>.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/" and [URL Sufix] must be "/view" "https://tableauaccelerators.github.io/drill-back/?Opportunity="+[Calculation_711568759570227200]"https://tableauaccelerators.github.io/drill-back/?Opportunity="&'Owned By'[Opportunity Id]
Salesforcecalculation_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing ClientsexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Calculation_995858528063909892]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Total Sales for Existing Clients], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Total Sales for Existing Clients], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
Salesforcecalculation_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for ProspectsexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Total Sales for Prospects (copy)_1849572132718514181]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation for Prospects], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation for Prospects], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
Salesforcecalculation_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Existing ClientsexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Total Sales for Existing Clients (copy)_1849572132718333956]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
Salesforcecalculation_Per Customer: Conversion RateexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Pipeline Generation (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034714406914]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE('Owned By'[Conversion Rate (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE('Owned By'[Conversion Rate (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
Salesforcecalculation_Per Customer: Average Deal SizeexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Total Sales (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034742312966]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Average Deal Size (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Average Deal Size (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
Salesforcecalculation_Per Customer: Total SalesexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Pipeline Generation (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034721849348]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Total Sales (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Total Sales (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
Salesforcecalculation_Per Customer: Total Sales for ProspectsexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Total Sales for Existing Clients (copy)_995858528065511429]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Total Sales for Prospects], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Total Sales for Prospects], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
SalesforcecalculationDays from Open to Closeexactavg(FLOAT(datediff("minute", [Created Date], [Calculation_822751375422500864]) / (24*60)))AVERAGEX('Owned By', CONVERT(DATEDIFF('Owned By'[CreatedDate (Owned By)], 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date], MINUTE) / (24*60), DOUBLE))

calculationKPI_AvgOpportunitySize_Calculationexact"Average of [Opportunity Amount]"
calculationKPI_AvgOpportunitySize_Descriptionexact"Average amount of opportunities, whether they are open or closed (expressed in currency)"
calculationKPI_SalesVelocity_Calculationskipped"(""Nb of Open Opp."" * ""Avg Deal Size"" * ""Won/Lost Rate"") Divided by ""Sales Cycle"""
calculationKPI_AvgDealSizeWon_Calculationskipped"Average of IF [Won Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Opportunity Amount] END"
calculationKPI_SalesVelocity_Descriptionexact"Determines how fast you are making money (you bring back about that much every day) (expressed in currency)"
calculationKPI_AvgDealSizeWon_Descriptionexact"Average amount of won opportunities (expressed in currency)"
calculationKPI_TotalClosedOpportunitiesAmount_Calculationskipped"Sum of IF [Open Flag]=""N"" THEN [Amount] END"
calculationKPI_TotalClosedOpportunitiesAmount_Descriptionexact"Total amount of opportunities that are closed (expressed in currency)"
calculationKPI_NbClosedOpportunities_Calculationskipped"Count Distinct of IF [Open Flag]=""N"" THEN [Opportunity Id] END"

calculationKPI_PipelineValue_Calculationskipped"Sum of IF [Open Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Opportunity Amount] END"
calculationKPI_NbWonOpportunities_Calculationskipped"Count Distinct of IF [Won Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Opportunity Id] END"
calculationKPI_NbClosedOpportunities_Descriptionexact"Number of opportunities that are closed"
calculationKPI_NbOpportunities_Descriptionexact"Total number of opportunities (open or closed)"
calculationKPI_NbOpenOpportunities_Calculationskipped"Count Distinct of IF [Open Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Opportunity Id] END"
calculationKPI_PipelineValue_Descriptionexact"Total amount of open opportunities (expressed in currency)"
calculationKPI_NbWonOpportunities_Descriptionexact"Number of opportunities that were won"
calculationKPI_NbLostOpportunities_Calculationskipped"Count Distinct of IF [Won Flag]=""N"" THEN [Opportunity Id] END"
calculationKPI_NbLostOpportunities_Descriptionexact"Number of opportunities that were lost"
calculationKPI_WeigthedPipelineValue_Calculationskipped"Sum of IF [Open Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Probability %]*[Opportunity Amount] END"
calculationKPI_WonLostRate_Calculationskipped"""Nb of Won Opportunities"" Divided by ""Nb of Closed Opportunities"""
calculationKPI_SalesCycle_Calculationexact"Average of TimeDifference([Opportunity Created Date], [Opportunity Closed Date]) (for closed opportunities only)"
calculationKPI_WeigthedPipelineValue_Descriptionexact"Total amount of open opportunities, weighted by probability of closing (expressed in currency)"
calculationKPI_WonLostRate_Descriptionexact"Share of the number of opportunities won in relation to the number of all closed opportunities (expressed in %)""Share of the number of opportunities won in relation to the number of all closed opportunities (expressed in \%)"
calculationKPI_SalesCycle_Descriptionexact"Average time it takes to close an opportunity (only considering won opportunities)"
calculationKPI_SalesCycleLost_Calculationexact"Average of TimeDifference([Opportunity Created Date], [Opportunity Closed Date]) (for lost opportunities only)"
calculationKPI_SalesCycleLost_Descriptionexact"Average time it takes to close an opportunity (only considering lost opportunities)"
calculationKPI_SalesCycleWon_Calculationexact"Average of TimeDifference([Opportunity Created Date], [Opportunity Closed Date]) (for won opportunities only)"
calculationKPI_TotalSales_Calculationskipped"Sum of IF [Won Flag]=""Y"" THEN [Opportunity Amount] END"

calculationKPI_TotalSales_Descriptionexact"Total amount of opportunities won (expressed in amount)"
calculationKPI_TotalPipelineGeneration_Calculationexact"Sum of [Opportunity Amount]"
calculationKPI_TotalPipelineGeneration_Descriptionexact"Total amount of opportunities created (expressed in amount)"
calculationKPI_ConversionRate_Calculationskipped"""Total Sales"" Divided by ""Total Closed Opportunities Amount"""
calculationKPI_ConversionRate_Descriptionexact"Share of the amount of opportunities won in relation to the amount of all closed opportunities (expressed in %)""Share of the amount of opportunities won in relation to the amount of all closed opportunities (expressed in \%)"

calculationKPI_NbOpenOpportunities_Descriptionexact"Number of opportunities that are currently open"
calculationSelect Dimensionexact"Account"SELECTEDVALUE('Select Dimension'[Value], "Account")

calculationpOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosingexact"GROWTH PLAN Closing"
