calculationAvg Probability (Open Opp.)exactAVG(if [Calculation_1142225515624624133] then [LinPack_574638457904073940] end)AVERAGEX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], 'Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationIs Open Opportunity?exact[Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y"'Owned By'[Open Flag]="Y"
calculationIs Last N months filter - Closed or Created Date?exact[Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] OR [Last N months filter - Closed Date (copy)_1142225515621388292]'Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?] || 'Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Created Date?]
calculationSales Cycle Won (Display)exactIF [LinPack_858688450507045362]<=30 then str(ROUND([LinPack_858688450507045362])) + ' d' ELSEIF [LinPack_858688450507045362]<=365 then str(ROUND([LinPack_858688450507045362]/30.25,1)) + ' mo' ELSE str(ROUND([LinPack_858688450507045362]/30.25,0)) + ' mo' ENDIF([Sales Cycle (won)] <= 30, FORMAT(ROUND([Sales Cycle (won)], 0), "0") & " d", IF([Sales Cycle (won)] <= 365, FORMAT(ROUND([Sales Cycle (won)]/30.25,1), "0") & " mo", FORMAT(ROUND([Sales Cycle (won)]/30.25,0), "0") & " mo"))
calculationDays to Close (avg)exactavg([Calculation_680325065948213248])AVERAGE('Owned By'[Days to Close])
calculationOneexactmax(1)MAXX('Owned By', 1)
calculationPipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (Star)exactREPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (description) (copy)_995858528069312525])," ","★") + REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (description) (copy)_995858528069312525])," ","☆")SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (num)])," ","☆")
calculationTypeexactIF ISNULL([Opportunity Type]) THEN 'Other' ELSE [Opportunity Type] ENDIF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Opportunity Type]))), "Other", CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Opportunity Type])))
calculationFirst Time Closed Won by Accountexact{fixed [Calculation_711568759570489345]: min (IF [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" THEN [Calculation_822751375422500864] END)}CALCULATE(MINX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y", 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date], BLANK())), ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Account]))
calculationIs First Time Client?exactIFNULL([Calculation_711568759572205574]="N" and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" and [Calculation_822751375422500864]=[Calculation_614178463385309184], False)IF(ISBLANK('Owned By'[Open Flag]="N" && 'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y" && 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date]=[First Time Closed Won by Account]), False, 'Owned By'[Open Flag]="N" && 'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y" && 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date]=[First Time Closed Won by Account])
calculationClient/Prospect by Opportunityexactif [Calculation_822751375422500864]>[Calculation_614178463385309184] then "Existing Clients" else "Prospects" endIF('Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date] > [First Time Closed Won by Account], "Existing Clients", "Prospects")
calculationLabel DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Clients (Existing)exact[Label DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Opp (copy)_614178463390113796] - [Label DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Clients (copy)_614178463392415753][Label DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Clients] - [Label DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Clients (New)]
calculationClient/Prospect by Accountexactif {fixed [Calculation_711568759570489345]: [LinPack_345685562057570044]}>=1 then "Existing Clients" else "Prospects" endIF(CALCULATE([Nb of Won Opportunities], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Account])) >= 1, "Existing Clients", "Prospects")
calculationDays to CloseexactDATEDIFF("day", [__MyToday], [Calculation_822751375422500864])DATEDIFF(DATE(2022,04,18), 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date], DAY)
calculationDays to Close (bucket)exactIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<0 then "Overdue" ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<30 then "0-30 days" ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<90 then "1-3 months" ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<180 then "3-6 months" ELSE "> 6 months" ENDIF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 0, "Overdue", IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 30, "0-30 days", IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 90, "1-3 months", IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 180, "3-6 months", "> 6 months"))))
calculationProbability (bucket)exactIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.25 THEN "0-25%" ELSEIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.50 THEN "25-50%" ELSEIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.75 THEN "50-75%" ELSE "75-100%" ENDIF(SUM('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.25, "0-25%", IF(SUM('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.50, "25-50%", IF(SUM('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.75, "50-75%", "75-100%")))
calculationRank Sales Value (for selected Opp Owner)exact// Count the distinct number of Opportunity Owner // where Opportunity Owner's [Sales Value] > Selected Opportunity Owner [Sales Value] COUNTD(if {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_235739231649065059]} > {MAX((IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : ZN([LinPack_235739231649065059])} ELSE 0 END))} and Not [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] then [Calculation_711568759570620418] end)+1/* TODO: DAX conversion validation failed for Calculation_703968976541376514: unterminated double-quoted string literal */ BLANK()
calculationOpportunity Idexact[Opportunity ID]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Opportunity ID]))
calculationAccountexact[Account Name]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Account[Account Name]))
calculationOpportunity Ownerexact[First Name]+' '+[Last Name]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE('Created By'[FirstName (Created By)]))&" "&CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE('Created By'[LastName (Created By)]))
calculationOpportunity Descriptionexact[Name]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Name]))
calculationOpportunity Stageexact[Stage]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Stage]))
calculationOpen FlagexactIIF([Closed],"N","Y","Unknown")IF(CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Closed])), "N", "Y")
calculationWon FlagexactIIF([Closed] AND [Won],"Y","N","Unknown" )IF(CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Closed])) && CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Won])), "Y", "N")
calculationProbability %exact[Probability (%)]/100CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Probability (%)]))/100
calculationOpportunity Created DateexactDATE([Created Date])DATE('Owned By'[CreatedDate (Owned By)])
calculationOpportunity Amountexact[Amount]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount]))
calculationIs Closed in Last x Days?exact[Calculation_680325065948213248]>=-1*int([Parameters].[pLastxDays]) and [Calculation_680325065948213248]<0 and [Calculation_711568759572205574]="N"'Owned By'[Days to Close] >= -1*INT("90") && 'Owned By'[Days to Close] < 0 && 'Owned By'[Open Flag]="N"
calculationOpen/Won/Lostexactif [Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y" then "Open" ELSEIF [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then "Won" ELSE "Lost" endIF('Owned By'[Open Flag]="Y", "Open", IF('Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y", "Won", "Lost"))
calculationOpportunity Close Dateexact[Close Date] //DATE(DATEADD('month',5,[Close Date]))CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Close Date]))
calculationDeal Size Bucketexactsplit([Deal Size Bucket (sort) (copy)_6178375792275554304], "|",2)PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Deal Size Bucket (key)], "|", "|"), 2)
calculationOpen/Won/Lost Iconexactcase [Calculation_747316110822866944] when "Open" then "" When "Won" then "✔" when "Lost" then "✘" endSWITCH('Owned By'[Open/Won/Lost], "Open", "", "Won", "✔", "Lost", "✘")
calculationTodayexact__MyTodayDATE(2022,04,18)
calculationPipeline Review - DONE - Keyexact//Achievements if [Calculation_746190227234947072] then "Last " + [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days|Closed Last "+ [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days" ELSEIF [Closed in Last 7 Days (copy)_746190227235745795] then "Last " + [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days|New Opportunities last "+ [Parameters].[pLastxDays] + " days" else "Other" endIF('Owned By'[Is Closed in Last x Days?], "Last " & "90" & " days|Closed Last "& "90" & " days", IF('Owned By'[Is Created in Last x Days?], "Last " & "90" & " days|New Opportunities last "& "90" & " days", "Other"))
calculationConversion Rate Average (for trends)exactRUNNING_SUM([LinPack_235739231649065059])/RUNNING_SUM([LinPack_707557147340278467])/* TODO: DAX conversion validation failed for Calculation_928867483214106624: unconverted Tableau function token detected in DAX output */ BLANK()
calculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Nb of OppexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Overdue")) = "Closing Overdue")))
calculation_Per Customer: Pipeline GenerationexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients (copy)_1243275034711019521]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation (Last N Months - Created Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation (Last N Months - Created Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
calculationTotal Sales for Existing ClientsexactSUM(IF [Calculation_614178463385964547]="Existing Clients" AND [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_961643984189344200] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Opportunity]="Existing Clients" && 'Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?], 'Owned By'[_Total Sales (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline GenerationexactIF [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5 then "1" ELSEIF [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*2 then "2" ELSEIF [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*3 then "3" ELSEIF [Calculation_995858528061263872] <= {fixed: max([Calculation_995858528061263872])}/5*4 then "4" ELSE "5" ENDIF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))
calculationIs Created in Last x Days?exact[Days to Close (copy)_928304533158825988]>=0 and [Days to Close (copy)_928304533158825988]<=int([Parameters].[pLastxDays]) and [Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y"'Owned By'[Days from Open] >= 0 && 'Owned By'[Days from Open] <= INT("90") && 'Owned By'[Open Flag]="Y"
calculationIs Last N months filter - Closed Date?exact[Calculation_822751375422500864]>DATEADD('month',-[Parameters].[Last x Days (copy)_1142225515621146627],__MyToday) AND [Calculation_822751375422500864] <= __MyToday'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date] > EDATE(DATE(2022,04,18), -36) && 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date] <= DATE(2022,04,18)
calculationIs Closing Overdue?exact[Calculation_680325065948213248]<0 and [Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y"'Owned By'[Days to Close] < 0 && 'Owned By'[Open Flag]="Y"
calculationIs Closing in Next x Days?exact[Calculation_680325065948213248]<=int([Parameters].[pNextxDays]) and [Calculation_711568759572205574]="Y"'Owned By'[Days to Close] <= INT("90") && 'Owned By'[Open Flag]="Y"
calculationDays to Close (bucket) (sort)exactIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<0 then 0 ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<30 then 10 ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<90 then 20 ELSEIF [Calculation_680325065948213248]<180 then 30 ELSE 100 ENDIF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 0, 0, IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 30, 10, IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 90, 20, IF('Owned By'[Days to Close] < 180, 30, 100))))
calculationOpportunity Type (filter)exact[Opportunity Type]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Opportunity Type]))
calculationDays from OpenexactDATEDIFF("day", [Created Date], [__MyToday])[M-based column]
calculationDeal Size Bucket (sort)exactint(split([Deal Size Bucket (sort) (copy)_6178375792275554304], "|",1))INT(PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Deal Size Bucket (key)], "|", "|"), 1))
calculationDeal Size Bucket (key)exactIF [LinPack_523892480737294295]< 50000 then "20|< 50k" ELSEIF [LinPack_523892480737294295]< 100000 then "30|50k - 100k" ELSEIF [LinPack_523892480737294295]< 200000 then "40|100k - 200k" ELSEIF [LinPack_523892480737294295]< 500000 then "50|200k - 500k" ELSEIF [LinPack_523892480737294295]<1000000 then "60|500k - 1M" ELSE "99|>1M" endIF('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)] < 50000, "20|< 50k", IF('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)] < 100000, "30|50k - 100k", IF('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)] < 200000, "40|100k - 200k", IF('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)] < 500000, "50|200k - 500k", IF('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)] < 1000000, "60|500k - 1M", "99|>1M")))))
calculationIs Won Opportunity?exact[Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y"'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y"
calculationIs Selected Opportunity Owner Flag?exact[Parameters].[Opportunity Owner Parameter]=[Calculation_711568759570620418]"Bellina Catmull"='Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]
calculationLabel DONE - Closed WON - Nb of OppexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y"))
calculationLabel DONE - Closed LOST - Nb of AccountsexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]<>"Y" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag] <> "Y"))
calculationLabel DONE - Closed LOST - Opp Amountexactsum(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]<>"Y" then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)SUMX('Owned By', IF((LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag] <> "Y", 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationLabel DONE - New - Nb of OppexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("New")) = "New")))
calculationLabel DONE - Closed WON - Nb of Clients (New)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" and [Calculation_614178463385661442] then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y" && 'Owned By'[Is First Time Client?]))
calculationLabel DONE - Closed WON - Nb of ClientsexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y"))
calculationLabel DONE - Closed LOST - Nb of OppexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]<>"Y" then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag] <> "Y"))
calculationLabel DONE - Closed WON - Opp AmountexactSUM(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "Closed") and [Calculation_711568759572299783]="Y" then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)SUMX('Owned By', IF((LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("Closed")) = "Closed") && 'Owned By'[Won Flag]="Y", 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationLabel DONE - New - Nb of Accounts (Prospect)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Prospects" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("New")) = "New") && 'Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Account]="Prospects"))
calculationLabel DONE - New - Nb of AccountsexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("New")) = "New")))
calculationLabel DONE - New - Opp AmountexactSUM(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)SUMX('Owned By', IF((LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("New")) = "New"), 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationLabel DONE - New - Nb of Accounts (Client)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1 (copy)_746190227238907913], "New") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Existing Clients" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2], LEN("New")) = "New") && 'Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Account]="Existing Clients"))
calculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Next x days - Nb of Accounts (Prospect)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Prospects" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Next")) = "Closing Next") && 'Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Account]="Prospects"))
calculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Next x days - Nb of Accounts (Client)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Existing Clients" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Next")) = "Closing Next") && 'Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Account]="Existing Clients"))
calculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Next x days - Nb of AccountsexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Next")) = "Closing Next")))
calculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Nb of Accounts (Client)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Existing Clients" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Overdue")) = "Closing Overdue") && 'Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Account]="Existing Clients"))
calculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Nb of Accounts (Prospect)exactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") and [Calculation_614178463393964044]="Prospects" then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Overdue")) = "Closing Overdue") && 'Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Account]="Prospects"))
calculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Nb of AccountsexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") then [Calculation_711568759570489345] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Account]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Overdue")) = "Closing Overdue")))
calculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Next x days - Nb of OppexactCOUNTD(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") then [Calculation_711568759570227200] end)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', (LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Next")) = "Closing Next")))
calculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Next x days - Opp AmountexactSUM(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Next") then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)SUMX('Owned By', IF((LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Next")) = "Closing Next"), 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationLabel FOCUS - Closing Overdue - Opp AmountexactSUM(if STARTSWITH([Pipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2 (copy)_746190227239038988], "Closing Overdue") then [LinPack_523892480737294295] end)SUMX('Owned By', IF((LEFT('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2], LEN("Closing Overdue")) = "Closing Overdue"), 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationIs Last N months filter - Created Date?exact[Created Date]>DATEADD('month',-[Parameters].[Last x Days (copy)_1142225515621146627],__MyToday) AND [Created Date] <= __MyToday'Owned By'[CreatedDate (Owned By)] > EDATE(DATE(2022,04,18), -36) && 'Owned By'[CreatedDate (Owned By)] <= DATE(2022,04,18)
calculationPipeline GeneratedexactSUM([LinPack_523892480737294295])SUM('Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)])
calculationNb of OwnersexactCOUNTD([Calculation_711568759570620418])DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])
calculationWon/Lost RateexactZN([LinPack_345685562057570044]) / ZN([LinPack_945051434441023635])IF(ISBLANK([Nb of Won Opportunities]), 0, [Nb of Won Opportunities]) / IF(ISBLANK([Nb of Closed Opportunities]), 0, [Nb of Closed Opportunities])
calculationDimensionexactCASE [Parameters].[LinPack_093258324044640973] WHEN "Account" THEN [Calculation_711568759570489345] WHEN "Open Flag" THEN [Calculation_711568759572205574] WHEN "Opportunity Owner" THEN [Calculation_711568759570620418] WHEN "Opportunity Stage" THEN [Calculation_711568759572115461] WHEN "Opportunity Type" THEN [Opportunity Type] WHEN "Won Flag" THEN [Calculation_711568759572299783] ENDSWITCH("Account", "Account", 'Owned By'[Account], "Open Flag", 'Owned By'[Open Flag], "Opportunity Owner", 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner], "Opportunity Stage", 'Owned By'[Opportunity Stage], "Opportunity Type", CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Opportunity Type])), "Won Flag", 'Owned By'[Won Flag])
calculationTotal SalesexactSUM([LinPack_961643984189344200])SUM('Owned By'[_Total Sales (Expression)])
calculationNb of Open OpportunitiesexactCOUNTD(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?]))
calculationNb of Won OpportunitiesexactCOUNTD(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Is Won Opportunity?]))
calculationAvg Deal Size (won)exactAVG([LinPack_760893960995960019])AVERAGE('Owned By'[_Avg Deal Size (won) (Expression)])
calculationSales Velocityexact(ZN([LinPack_260602485593130101]) * ZN([LinPack_416672484957473515]) * ZN([LinPack_037187737916244637])) / ZN([LinPack_451823525181570600])(IF(ISBLANK([Nb of Open Opportunities]), 0, [Nb of Open Opportunities]) * IF(ISBLANK([Avg Deal Size (won)]), 0, [Avg Deal Size (won)]) * IF(ISBLANK('Owned By'[Won/Lost Rate]), 0, 'Owned By'[Won/Lost Rate])) / IF(ISBLANK([Sales Cycle]), 0, [Sales Cycle])
calculationSales CycleexactAVG(FLOAT(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN datediff("minute", [Created Date], [Calculation_822751375422500864]) / (24*60) END))AVERAGEX('Owned By', CONVERT(IF(NOT 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], DATEDIFF('Owned By'[CreatedDate (Owned By)], 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date], MINUTE) / (24*60), BLANK()), DOUBLE))
calculationAvg ProbabilityexactAVG([LinPack_574638457904073940])AVERAGE('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)])
calculationWeighted Pipeline ValueexactSUM(FLOAT(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759573139467]*[Amount] END))SUMX('Opportunities', CONVERT(IF(LOOKUPVALUE('Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], 'Owned By'[Id], Opportunities[OwnerId]), LOOKUPVALUE('Owned By'[Probability %], 'Owned By'[Id], Opportunities[OwnerId])*'Opportunities'[Amount], BLANK()), DOUBLE))
calculation_Pipeline Generated (Expression)exact[Amount]CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount]))
calculation_Avg Probability (Expression)exact[Calculation_711568759573139467]'Owned By'[Probability %]
calculationNb of OpportunitiesexactCOUNTD([Calculation_711568759570227200])DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id])
calculationTotal Closed Opportunities AmountexactSUM([LinPack_808645294632541416])SUM('Owned By'[_Total Closed Opportunities Amount (Expression)])
calculationConversion RateexactZN([LinPack_235739231649065059]) / ZN([LinPack_707557147340278467])IF(ISBLANK([Total Sales]), 0, [Total Sales]) / IF(ISBLANK([Total Closed Opportunities Amount]), 0, [Total Closed Opportunities Amount])
calculation_Avg Deal Size (won) (Expression)exactFLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Amount] END)CONVERT(IF('Owned By'[Is Won Opportunity?], CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount])), BLANK()), DOUBLE)
calculationPipeline ValueexactSUM(FLOAT(IF [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Amount] END))SUMX('Opportunities', CONVERT(IF(LOOKUPVALUE('Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], 'Owned By'[Id], Opportunities[OwnerId]), 'Opportunities'[Amount], BLANK()), DOUBLE))
calculation_Total Closed Opportunities Amount (Expression)exactFLOAT(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Amount] END)CONVERT(IF(NOT 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?], CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount])), BLANK()), DOUBLE)
calculationSales Cycle (won)exactAVG(FLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN datediff("minute", [Created Date], [Calculation_822751375422500864]) / (24*60) END))AVERAGEX('Owned By', CONVERT(IF('Owned By'[Is Won Opportunity?], DATEDIFF('Owned By'[CreatedDate (Owned By)], 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date], MINUTE) / (24*60), BLANK()), DOUBLE))
calculationNb of Closed OpportunitiesexactCOUNTD(IF NOT [Calculation_1142225515624624133] THEN [Calculation_711568759570227200] END)CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('Owned By'[Opportunity Id]), FILTER('Owned By', NOT 'Owned By'[Is Open Opportunity?]))
calculation_Total Sales (Expression)exactFLOAT(IF [Is Open Opportunity? (copy)_17451502251433984] THEN [Amount] END)CONVERT(IF('Owned By'[Is Won Opportunity?], CALCULATE(SELECTEDVALUE(Opportunities[Amount])), BLANK()), DOUBLE)
calculationOpportunity Owner Class - TitleexactIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN "CHAMPIONS" ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN "CLOSERS Growth Plan: Pipeline Generation" ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN "HUNTERS/FARMERS Growth Plan: Closing" ELSE "REQUIRED IMPROVEMENTS" ENDIF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_Champions], "CHAMPIONS", IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], "CLOSERS Growth Plan: Pipeline Generation", IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], "HUNTERS/FARMERS Growth Plan: Closing", "REQUIRED IMPROVEMENTS")))
calculationOpportunity Owner Class (sort)exactIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN 1 ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN 2 ELSEIF [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683]=[Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN 3 ELSE 4 ENDIF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_Champions], 1, IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], 2, IF([Opportunity Owner Class]=[pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], 3, 4)))
calculationOpportunity Owner ClassexactIF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] >3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] >3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] ELSEIF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] >3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] <=3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] ELSEIF [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042] <=3 AND [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443] >3 THEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] ELSE [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303] ENDIF([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)] > 3 && [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)] > 3, [pOpportunityOwner_Champions], IF([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)] > 3 && [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)] <= 3, [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], IF([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)] <= 3 && [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)] > 3, [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], [pOpportunityOwner_RequiredImprovements])))
calculationOpportunity Owner Class - ActionexactCASE [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683] WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN "Reward these elements, they can be a model for the other owners. Leverage their best-practices." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN "Guide them on how to generate pipeline." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN "Provide these elements additional trainings to improve their ability to convince clients." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303] THEN "These opportunity owners need to improve their skills in both areas, to get more business and to win over clients. Train them quickly." ENDSWITCH([Opportunity Owner Class], [pOpportunityOwner_Champions], "Reward these elements, they can be a model for the other owners. Leverage their best-practices.", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], "Guide them on how to generate pipeline.", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], "Provide these elements additional trainings to improve their ability to convince clients.", [pOpportunityOwner_RequiredImprovements], "These opportunity owners need to improve their skills in both areas, to get more business && to win over clients. Train them quickly.")
calculationOpportunity Owner Class - DescriptionexactCASE [Opportunity Owner Class Deal Size (copy)_995858528092102683] WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_BigDeals (copy)_995858528093823004] THEN "Top performers in the team. They perform well in all areas and pull the team up." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_Champions (copy)_995858528093941789] THEN "Effective at closing and winning deals, they can develop in Pipeline Generation (farming or hunting)." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094035998] THEN "Good at developing pipeline, they will improve their performance by developing their ability to close and win the deals." WHEN [Parameters].[pOpportunityOwner_ImprovePipelineGen (copy)_995858528094134303] THEN "Underperforming in pipeline generation and deal closing. " ENDSWITCH([Opportunity Owner Class], [pOpportunityOwner_Champions], "Top performers in the team. They perform well in all areas && pull the team up.", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanPipelineGeneration], "Effective at closing && winning deals, they can develop in Pipeline Generation (farming || hunting).", [pOpportunityOwner_GrowthPlanClosing], "Good at developing pipeline, they will improve their performance by developing their ability to close && win the deals.", [pOpportunityOwner_RequiredImprovements], "Underperforming in pipeline generation && deal closing. ")
calculationConversion Rate (Last N Months - Closed Date)exact[Pipeline Generation (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034721849348]/[Total Sales (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034722263045][Total Sales (Last N Months - Closed Date)]/[Total Closed Opportunities Amount (Last N Months - Closed Date)]
calculationTotal Sales (Last N Months - Closed Date)exactSUM(IF [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_961643984189344200] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?], 'Owned By'[_Total Sales (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationPipeline Generation (Last N Months - Created Date)exactSUM(IF [Last N months filter - Closed Date (copy)_1142225515621388292] then [LinPack_523892480737294295] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Created Date?], 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationPipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (Star)exactREPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042])," ","★") + REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description) (copy)_995858528072065042])," ","☆")SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)])," ","☆")
calculationPipeline Profile - Conversion RateexactIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5 then "1" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*2 then "2" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*3 then "3" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528061906945])}/5*4 then "4" ELSE "5" ENDIF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Conversion Rate]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))
calculationPipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (description)exactCASE [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528067575816] WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW" WHEN "2" THEN "LOW" WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM" WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH" WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH" END + " Average Deal Size"SWITCH([Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size], "1", "VERY LOW", "2", "LOW", "3", "MEDIUM", "4", "HIGH", "5", "VERY HIGH") & " Average Deal Size"
calculationPipeline Axisexact100
calculationPipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (num)exactint([Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528067575816])INT([Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size])
calculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (Star)exactREPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443])," ","★") + REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description) (copy)_995858528072167443])," ","☆")SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)])," ","☆")
calculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing ClientsexactIF [_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459])}/5 then "1" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459])}/5*2 then "2" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459])}/5*3 then "3" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528062611459])}/5*4 then "4" ELSE "5" ENDIF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))
calculationPipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (description)exactCASE [Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528067751945] WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW" WHEN "2" THEN "LOW" WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM" WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH" WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH" END + " Conversion Rate"SWITCH([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate], "1", "VERY LOW", "2", "LOW", "3", "MEDIUM", "4", "HIGH", "5", "VERY HIGH") & " Conversion Rate"
calculationPipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (num)exactint([Pipeline Profile - Average Deal Size (copy)_995858528067751945])INT([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate])
calculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Existing Clients (Star)exactREPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing Clients (num) (copy)_1849572132723974155])," ","★") + REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing Clients (num) (copy)_1849572132723974155])," ","☆")SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Existing Clients (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Existing Clients (num)])," ","☆")
calculationPipeline Profile - Average Deal SizeexactIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528062124034] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528062124034])}/5 then "1" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528062124034] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528062124034])}/5*2 then "2" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528062124034] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528062124034])}/5*3 then "3" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528062124034] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_995858528062124034])}/5*4 then "4" ELSE "5" ENDIF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Average Deal Size] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Average Deal Size]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Average Deal Size] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Average Deal Size]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Average Deal Size] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Average Deal Size]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Average Deal Size] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Average Deal Size]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))
calculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (description)exactCASE [Calculation_995858528066854919] WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW" WHEN "2" THEN "LOW" WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM" WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH" WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH" END + " Ability to generate pipeline"SWITCH([Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation], "1", "VERY LOW", "2", "LOW", "3", "MEDIUM", "4", "HIGH", "5", "VERY HIGH") & " Ability to generate pipeline"
calculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation (num)exactint([Calculation_995858528066854919])INT([Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation])
calculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Prospects (Star)exactREPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (num) (copy)_1849572132723974157])," ","★") + REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (num) (copy)_1849572132723974157])," ","☆")SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Prospects (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Prospects (num)])," ","☆")
calculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales (Star)exactREPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (num) (copy)_1849572132716658690])," ","★") + REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (num) (copy)_1849572132716658690])," ","☆")SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Total Sales (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Total Sales (num)])," ","☆")
calculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing Clients (Star)exactREPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales for Existing Clients (description) (copy)_995858528072245268])," ","★") + REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Total Sales for Existing Clients (description) (copy)_995858528072245268])," ","☆")SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing Clients (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing Clients (num)])," ","☆")
calculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales to ProspectsexactIF [_Per Customer: Total Sales on Client (copy)_995858528065740806] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Total Sales on Client (copy)_995858528065740806])}/5 then "1" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Total Sales on Client (copy)_995858528065740806] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Total Sales on Client (copy)_995858528065740806])}/5*2 then "2" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Total Sales on Client (copy)_995858528065740806] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Total Sales on Client (copy)_995858528065740806])}/5*3 then "3" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Total Sales on Client (copy)_995858528065740806] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Total Sales on Client (copy)_995858528065740806])}/5*4 then "4" ELSE "5" ENDIF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))
calculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing Clients (description)exactCASE [Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (copy)_995858528068132874] WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW" WHEN "2" THEN "LOW" WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM" WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH" WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH" END + " Ability to sell to existing clients"SWITCH([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing Clients], "1", "VERY LOW", "2", "LOW", "3", "MEDIUM", "4", "HIGH", "5", "VERY HIGH") & " Ability to sell to existing clients"
calculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing Clients (num)exactint([Pipeline Profile - Conversion Rate (copy)_995858528068132874])INT([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing Clients])
calculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (description)exactCASE [Pipeline Profile - Total Sales for Existing Clients (copy)_995858528068710411] WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW" WHEN "2" THEN "LOW" WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM" WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH" WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH" END + " Ability to sell to prospects"SWITCH([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects], "1", "VERY LOW", "2", "LOW", "3", "MEDIUM", "4", "HIGH", "5", "VERY HIGH") & " Ability to sell to prospects"
calculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (num)exactint([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales for Existing Clients (copy)_995858528068710411])INT([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects])
calculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (Star)exactREPLACE(SPACE([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales for Prospects (description) (copy)_995858528072331285])," ","★") + REPLACE(SPACE(5-[Pipeline Profile - Total Sales for Prospects (description) (copy)_995858528072331285])," ","☆")SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", [Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (num)])," ","★") & SUBSTITUTE(REPT(" ", 5-[Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (num)])," ","☆")
calculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Existing ClientsexactIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_1849572132719239174] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_1849572132719239174])}/5 then "1" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_1849572132719239174] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_1849572132719239174])}/5*2 then "2" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_1849572132719239174] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_1849572132719239174])}/5*3 then "3" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_1849572132719239174] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy)_1849572132719239174])}/5*4 then "4" ELSE "5" ENDIF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))
calculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Existing Clients (description)exactCASE [Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Existing Clients (copy)_1849572132723974152] WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW" WHEN "2" THEN "LOW" WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM" WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH" WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH" END + " Ability to generate pipeline with existing clients"SWITCH([Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Existing Clients], "1", "VERY LOW", "2", "LOW", "3", "MEDIUM", "4", "HIGH", "5", "VERY HIGH") & " Ability to generate pipeline with existing clients"

calculationPipeline Profile - Total SalesexactIF [_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects (copy)_1849572132717031427] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects (copy)_1849572132717031427])}/5 then "1" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects (copy)_1849572132717031427] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects (copy)_1849572132717031427])}/5*2 then "2" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects (copy)_1849572132717031427] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects (copy)_1849572132717031427])}/5*3 then "3" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects (copy)_1849572132717031427] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Total Sales for Prospects (copy)_1849572132717031427])}/5*4 then "4" ELSE "5" ENDIF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Total Sales]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))
calculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to ProspectsexactIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy) (copy)_1849572132719255559] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy) (copy)_1849572132719255559])}/5 then "1" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy) (copy)_1849572132719255559] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy) (copy)_1849572132719255559])}/5*2 then "2" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy) (copy)_1849572132719255559] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy) (copy)_1849572132719255559])}/5*3 then "3" ELSEIF [_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy) (copy)_1849572132719255559] <= {fixed: max([_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation (copy) (copy)_1849572132719255559])}/5*4 then "4" ELSE "5" ENDIF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Prospects] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Prospects]), ALL('Owned By'))/5, "1", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Prospects] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Prospects]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*2, "2", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Prospects] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Prospects]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*3, "3", IF('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Prospects] <= CALCULATE(MAX('Owned By'[_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Prospects]), ALL('Owned By'))/5*4, "4", "5"))))
calculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales (description)exactCASE [Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (copy)_1849572132716658688] WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW" WHEN "2" THEN "LOW" WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM" WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH" WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH" END + " Ability to sell"SWITCH([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales], "1", "VERY LOW", "2", "LOW", "3", "MEDIUM", "4", "HIGH", "5", "VERY HIGH") & " Ability to sell"
calculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Prospects (description)exactCASE [Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (copy)_1849572132723974153] WHEN "1" THEN "VERY LOW" WHEN "2" THEN "LOW" WHEN "3" THEN "MEDIUM" WHEN "4" THEN "HIGH" WHEN "5" THEN "VERY HIGH" END + " Ability to generate pipeline with prospects"SWITCH([Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Prospects], "1", "VERY LOW", "2", "LOW", "3", "MEDIUM", "4", "HIGH", "5", "VERY HIGH") & " Ability to generate pipeline with prospects"
calculationPipeline Profile - Total Sales (num)exactint([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (copy)_1849572132716658688])INT([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales])
calculationPipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Prospects (num)exactint([Pipeline Profile - Total Sales to Prospects (copy)_1849572132723974153])INT([Pipeline Profile - Pipeline Generation to Prospects])
calculationPipeline Review - DONE - Cat 1exactSPLIT([Calculation_928304533153746946], "|", 1)PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Key], "|", "|"), 1)
calculationPipeline Review - DONE - Cat 2exactSPLIT([Calculation_928304533153746946], "|", 2)PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - DONE - Key], "|", "|"), 2)
calculationPipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 1exactSPLIT([Pipeline Review - DONE - Key (copy)_746190227239038986], "|", 1)PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Key], "|", "|"), 1)
calculationPipeline Review - FOCUS - Cat 2exactSPLIT([Pipeline Review - DONE - Key (copy)_746190227239038986], "|", 2)PATHITEM(SUBSTITUTE('Owned By'[Pipeline Review - FOCUS - Key], "|", "|"), 2)
calculationPipeline Review - FOCUS - KeyexactIF [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_746190227237216263] then "Overdue|Closing Overdue" ELSEIF [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_746190227237490696] then "Next " + [Parameters].[pNextxDays] + " days|Closing Next "+ [Parameters].[pNextxDays] + " days" else "Other" endIF('Owned By'[Is Closing Overdue?], "Overdue|Closing Overdue", IF('Owned By'[Is Closing in Next x Days?], "Next " & "90" & " days|Closing Next "& "90" & " days", "Other"))
calculationProbability (bucket) (sort)exactIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.25 THEN 10 ELSEIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.50 THEN 20 ELSEIF [LinPack_574638457904073940]<0.75 THEN 30 ELSE 40 ENDIF(MAX('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.25, 10, IF(MAX('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.50, 20, IF(MAX('Owned By'[_Avg Probability (Expression)]) < 0.75, 30, 40)))
calculationSales Value (for selected Opp Owner)exactMAX(IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_235739231649065059]} END)MAXX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Selected Opportunity Owner Flag?], CALCULATE([Total Sales]), BLANK()))
calculationRank Conversion Rate (for selected Opp Owner)exact// Count the distinct number of Opportunity Owner // where Opportunity Owner's [Conversion Rate] > Selected Opportunity Owner [Conversion Rate] COUNTD(if {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_713531991123124037]} > {MAX((IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : ZN([LinPack_713531991123124037])} ELSE 0 END))} and Not [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] then [Calculation_711568759570620418] end)+1/* TODO: DAX conversion validation failed for Rank Sales Value (for selected Opp Owner) (copy)_1048775823272144897: unterminated double-quoted string literal */ BLANK()
calculationRank Total Opp Amount (for selected Opp Owner)exact// Count the distinct number of Opportunity Owner // where Opportunity Owner's [Total Opp Amount] > Selected Opportunity Owner [Total Opp Amount] COUNTD(if {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_017255839264062096]} > {MAX((IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : ZN([LinPack_017255839264062096])} ELSE 0 END))} and Not [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] then [Calculation_711568759570620418] end)+1/* TODO: DAX conversion validation failed for Rank Sales Value (for selected Opp Owner) (copy)_928867483237888003: unterminated double-quoted string literal */ BLANK()
calculationConversion Rate (for selected Opp Owner)exactMAX(IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_713531991123124037]} END)MAXX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Selected Opportunity Owner Flag?], CALCULATE('Owned By'[Conversion Rate]), BLANK()))
calculationTotal Opp Amount (for selected Opp Owner)exactMAX(IF [Is Selected Opportunity Stage Flag (copy)_813744216047374336] THEN {INCLUDE [Calculation_711568759570620418] : [LinPack_017255839264062096]} END)MAXX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Selected Opportunity Owner Flag?], CALCULATE([Pipeline Generated]), BLANK()))
calculationTotal Closed Opportunities Amount (Last N Months - Closed Date)exactSUM(IF [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_808645294632541416] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?], 'Owned By'[_Total Closed Opportunities Amount (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationAverage Deal Size (Last N Months - Closed Date)exactSUM(IF [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_760893960995960019] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?], 'Owned By'[_Avg Deal Size (won) (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationPipeline Generation for Existing ClientsexactSUM(IF [Calculation_614178463385964547]="Existing Clients" and [Last N months filter - Closed Date (copy)_1142225515621388292] THEN [LinPack_523892480737294295] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Opportunity]="Existing Clients" && 'Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Created Date?], 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationTotal Sales for ProspectsexactSUM(IF [Calculation_614178463385964547]="Prospects" AND [Closed in Last x Days (copy)_1142225515614175234] then [LinPack_961643984189344200] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Opportunity]="Prospects" && 'Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Closed Date?], 'Owned By'[_Total Sales (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationPipeline Generation for ProspectsexactSUM(IF [Calculation_614178463385964547]="Prospects" and [Last N months filter - Closed Date (copy)_1142225515621388292] then [LinPack_523892480737294295] END)SUMX('Owned By', IF('Owned By'[Client/Prospect by Opportunity]="Prospects" && 'Owned By'[Is Last N months filter - Created Date?], 'Owned By'[_Pipeline Generated (Expression)], BLANK()))
calculationURL Drill-back to Source Application on Opportunityexact// This Accelerator is configured to allow you yo drill back to your Source Application to see the detail of each "Opportunity Id" // The Drill Back is activated when clicking on a Project in the Accelerator // using a URL with the following format: // [URL Prefix] + [Opportunity Id] + [URL Suffix] // // For example when drilling back to an Opportunity on Salesforce Sales Cloud, // [URL Prefix] must be: "https://<YOUR_SALESFORCE_ORG>.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/" and [URL Sufix] must be "/view" "https://tableauaccelerators.github.io/drill-back/?Opportunity="+[Calculation_711568759570227200]"https://tableauaccelerators.github.io/drill-back/?Opportunity="&'Owned By'[Opportunity Id]
calculation_Per Customer: Total Sales for Existing ClientsexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Calculation_995858528063909892]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Total Sales for Existing Clients], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Total Sales for Existing Clients], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
calculation_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for ProspectsexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Total Sales for Prospects (copy)_1849572132718514181]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation for Prospects], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation for Prospects], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
calculation_Per Customer: Pipeline Generation for Existing ClientsexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Total Sales for Existing Clients (copy)_1849572132718333956]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Pipeline Generation for Existing Clients], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
calculation_Per Customer: Conversion RateexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Pipeline Generation (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034714406914]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE('Owned By'[Conversion Rate (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE('Owned By'[Conversion Rate (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
calculation_Per Customer: Average Deal SizeexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Total Sales (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034742312966]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Average Deal Size (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Average Deal Size (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
calculation_Per Customer: Total SalesexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Pipeline Generation (Last N Months) (copy)_1243275034721849348]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Total Sales (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Total Sales (Last N Months - Closed Date)], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
calculation_Per Customer: Total Sales for ProspectsexactZN({fixed [Calculation_711568759570620418]: [Total Sales for Existing Clients (copy)_995858528065511429]})IF(ISBLANK(CALCULATE([Total Sales for Prospects], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner]))), 0, CALCULATE([Total Sales for Prospects], ALLEXCEPT('Owned By', 'Owned By'[Opportunity Owner])))
calculationDays from Open to Closeexactavg(FLOAT(datediff("minute", [Created Date], [Calculation_822751375422500864]) / (24*60)))AVERAGEX('Owned By', CONVERT(DATEDIFF('Owned By'[CreatedDate (Owned By)], 'Owned By'[Opportunity Close Date], MINUTE) / (24*60), DOUBLE))
calculation__MyTodayexactMAKEDATE(2022,04,18)DATE(2022,04,18)
